label: Bus sleep — on
description: Put the vehicle bus to sleep (calls your etfw.py bus_sleep_on). Simulated if no script is set.

label: Bus sleep — off
description: Wake the vehicle bus back up (calls your etfw.py bus_sleep_off).

label: Set ECU state
description: Send a named ECU state to your etfw.py script (e.g. normal_operation).

label: Get ECU state
description: Read back the current ECU/bus state from your etfw.py script.
